header.title: Competitor Benchmarks
header.description: Compare brand visibility across AI platforms within a market

charts.noDataForChart: Not enough data to display chart
charts.ariaShareBar: Bar chart showing recommendation share for each brand in {market}
charts.ariaPeriodComparison: Grouped bar chart comparing recommendation share between previous and current period in {market}

platforms.title: Platform Breakdown
platforms.description: Where each brand is strongest and weakest
platforms.noBreakdown: Select 'All platforms' to see the platform breakdown

presence.title: Brand Presence Matrix
presence.description: Which brands appear for which prompts
presence.noBrands: No brand data for this prompt
presence.ariaPresent: {brand} is present for prompt {prompt} with {count, plural, one {# citation} other {# citations}}

empty.noMarket: Select a market to view competitor benchmarks
empty.noMarketDescription: Choose a prompt set that represents the competitive category you want to analyse
empty.noDataDescription: Run models against this prompt set to generate benchmark data
empty.noPromptSetsDescription: Create a prompt set to define a competitive market for benchmarking

error.noAccess: You don't have access to this workspace's benchmarks
error.noAccessDescription: Ask the workspace owner to grant you access
error.staleMarket: The selected market no longer exists
